full_text:
Jia Chong (Gonglü) 賈充 (公閭)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jia Chong (賈充), styledGonglü (公閭). Suggested usurpation of the throne to Sima Yan and opposed invasion of Wu. Jia Chong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Jia Chong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
